headline: Freedom Broker Turns Bullish on Mosaic (MOS), Citing Recovery in Sulfur Supply
summary: The Mosaic Company (NYSE:MOS) is included among the 10 Dividend Stocks With Low Payout Ratios and Strong Upside Potential. On June 17, Freedom Broker double upgraded The Mosaic Company (NYSE:MOS) to Buy from Sell. It raised a stock’s price target to $32 from $24. The analyst said sulfur costs surged and phosphate gross margins came […]
